subject: Gaming
title: Women in Gaming History
description: A quick win: understand Women in Gaming History.

hook.text: Women have always played and made games. But the industry spent decades pretending they didn't exist.

buildup.text: Early arcade games were played by everyone. But 1990s marketing deliberately targeted boys exclusively.

discovery.text: Roberta Williams co-founded Sierra and created King's Quest. Women shaped gaming's earliest creative breakthroughs.

twist.text: By 2024, women make up nearly half of all gamers. The stereotype of gaming as male-only was always a myth.

climax.text: The industry is slowly correcting decades of exclusion—more female protagonists, developers, and executives.

punchline.text: Women always played. The industry just pretended otherwise for decades.

quiz.question: What percentage of gamers are women as of 2024?
